mermaidSyntax:
graph TD
  subgraph GEN["🧬 Genomics Pipeline"]
    G1[WGS Sequencing] --> G2[Variant Calling]
    G2 --> G3[SNP/Indel Annotation]
  end

  subgraph TRA["🧪 Transcriptomics Pipeline"]
    T1[RNA-seq] --> T2[Differential Expression]
    T2 --> T3[Pathway Enrichment]
  end

  subgraph PRO["🔬 Proteomics Pipeline"]
    P1[Mass Spectrometry] --> P2[Protein Quantification]
    P2 --> P3[Post-translational Modifications]
  end

  G3 --> INT
  T3 --> INT
  P3 --> INT

  G2 -.->|variants inform DE| T2
  P3 -.->|validate findings| T3

  subgraph INT_HUB["🔗 Integration Hub"]
    INT[Integration Hub]
    INT --> MOFA[Multi-omics Factor Analysis MOFA]
    INT --> NET[Network Analysis]
    INT --> CAU[Causal Inference]
  end

  MOFA --> BIO
  NET --> MEC
  CAU --> PUB

  subgraph BIO_OUT["🎯 Biomarker Discovery"]
    BIO[Biomarker Discovery] --> B1[Candidate Selection]
    B1 --> B2[Validation Cohort]
    B2 --> B3[Clinical Utility]
  end

  subgraph MEC_OUT["⚙️ Mechanism Insight"]
    MEC[Mechanism Insight] --> M1[Pathway Modeling]
    M1 --> M2[Drug Target Identification]
  end

  subgraph PUB_OUT["📄 Publication"]
    PUB[Publication] --> P1[Manuscript]
    P1 --> P2[Peer Review]
    P2 --> P3[Journal Publication]
  end

  B3 -.->|targeted validation| G1
  B3 -.->|targeted validation| T1
  B3 -.->|targeted validation| P1

  style INT fill:#6366f1,stroke:#4338ca,color:#fff
  style MOFA fill:#818cf8,stroke:#6366f1,color:#fff
  style NET fill:#818cf8,stroke:#6366f1,color:#fff
  style CAU fill:#818cf8,stroke:#6366f1,color:#fff
